Part.Source:
loadWWPContext.Call(&Context) If &Context.PesCod = 0 Return EndIf
&PesRaz = &Context.PesRaz For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where FilCod = &Context.FilCod &FilFan = FilFan Exit EndFor
MB 4 MT 2
Header &titulo = 'VENDAS POR FORNECEDOR' print Cabecalho End
If &QtdTipo = 'A' For Each Order EmpCod,FilCod, PedSts, LctAtuEst, LctGerFin,ProPadForCod,ProGraRefPadL Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedDtaFat >= &PedDtaFat and PedDtaFat <= &PedDtaFat_Go Where LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida Where LctGerFin = &LctGerFin Where ProSts = Status_Produto.ATIVO when &IsInativos = false where ProSts <> Status_Produto.EXCLUIDO when &IsInativos = true Where PedSts = &PedSts when not &PedSts.IsEmpty() Where PedSts <> Status_Pedido.CANCELADO when &PedSts.IsEmpty() Where ProPadForCod = &ForCod when not &ForCod.IsEmpty()
If ProPadForCod <> &ProPadForCod If &PedQtd > 0 &TotForPedVlrItm += &PedVlrItm &TotForPedQtd += &PedQtd &TotForPedVlrItmComDsc += &PedVlrItmComDsc &TotForPedQtdCan += &PedQtdCan &TotForPedVlrCan += &PedVlrCan Print ProdutoDados &PedQtd = 0 &PedVlrItm = 0 &PedVlrItmComDsc = 0 &PedQtdCan = 0 &PedVlrCan = 0 EndIf If &TotForPedVlrItm > 0 Print TotalFornecedor &TotForPedVlrItm = 0 &TotForPedQtd = 0 &TotForPedVlrItmComDsc = 0 &TotForPedQtdCan = 0 &TotForPedVlrCan = 0 EndIf &ProPadForRaz = trim(str(ProPadForCod)) +' - '+trim(ProPadForRaz) Print Fornecedoranalitico Print ProdutoMenu EndIf
&ProPadForCod = ProPadForCod
If &ProGraRef <> ProGraRef and &ProGraRef <> '' If &PedQtd > 0 &TotForPedVlrItm += &PedVlrItm &TotForPedQtd += &PedQtd &TotForPedQtdCan += &PedQtdCan &TotForPedVlrCan += &PedVlrCan &TotForPedVlrItmComDsc += &PedVlrItmComDsc Print ProdutoDados EndIf
&PedQtd = 0 &PedVlrItm = 0 &PedVlrItmComDsc = 0 &PedQtdCan = 0 &PedVlrCan = 0 EndIf
&ProGraRef = ProGraRef &ProNomGra = trim(ProGraRef)+'- '+trim(ProNomGra) &PedQtd += PedQtd &PedVlrItm += PedVlrItm //Bruto &PedVlrItmComDsc += PedVlrItmComDsc //liquido &PedQtdCan += PedQtdCan &PedVlrCan += PedQtdCan* PedVlrUntComDsc
&TotGerPedQtd += PedQtd // Qtd Geral Bruto &TotGerPedVlrItm += PedVlrItm // Total geral bruto &TotGerPedQtdCan += PedQtdCan // Qtde Cancelada &TotGerPedVlrCan += PedQtdCan* PedVlrUntComDsc &TotGerPedVlrItmComDsc += PedVlrItmComDsc EndFor
If &PedQtd > 0 &TotForPedVlrItm += &PedVlrItm &TotForPedQtd += &PedQtd &TotForPedVlrItmComDsc += &PedVlrItmComDsc &TotForPedQtdCan += &PedQtdCan &TotForPedVlrCan += &PedVlrCan Print ProdutoDados &PedQtd = 0 &PedVlrItm = 0 &PedVlrItmComDsc = 0 &PedQtdCan = 0 &PedVlrCan = 0 EndIf
If &TotForPedVlrItm > 0 Print TotalFornecedor EndIf
Print TotalGeral Else //Sintetico
For Each Order EmpCod,FilCod, PedSts, LctAtuEst, LctGerFin,ProPadForCod,ProGraRefPadL Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedDtaFat >= &PedDtaFat and PedDtaFat <= &PedDtaFat_Go Where LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida Where LctGerFin = &LctGerFin Where ProSts = Status_Produto.ATIVO when &IsInativos = false where ProSts <> Status_Produto.EXCLUIDO when &IsInativos = true Where PedSts = &PedSts when not &PedSts.IsEmpty() Where PedSts <> Status_Pedido.CANCELADO when &PedSts.IsEmpty() Where ProPadForCod = &ForCod when not &ForCod.IsEmpty() If &ProPadForCod = 0 Print MenuSintetico EndIf
If ProPadForCod <> &ProPadForCod and &ProPadForCod <> 0 &ProPadForRaz = trim(str(&ProPadForCod)) +' - '+trim(&auxProPadForRaz) If &TotForPedVlrItm > 0 Print FornecedorSintetico &TotPerPer += &PerPer &TotForPedVlrItm = 0 &TotForPedQtd = 0 &TotForPedVlrItmComDsc = 0 &TotForPedQtdCan = 0 &TotForPedVlrCan = 0 EndIf EndIf
&ProPadForCod = ProPadForCod &auxProPadForRaz = ProPadForRaz
&TotForPedVlrItm += (PedQtdCan* PedVlrUntComDsc) + (PedQtd * PedVlrUntComDsc) // Valor vendido &TotForPedQtd += PedQtd &TotForPedQtdCan += PedQtdCan &TotForPedVlrCan += PedQtdCan* PedVlrUntComDsc &TotForPedVlrItmComDsc += PedVlrItmComDsc //valor Entregue &PerPer = 0 If &TotForPedVlrItmComDsc > 0 &PerPer = (((&TotForPedVlrItm / &TotForPedVlrItmComDsc) * 100) - 100) EndIf
&TotGerPedQtd += PedQtd // Qtd Geral Bruto &TotGerPedVlrItm += PedVlrItm // Total geral bruto &TotGerPedQtdCan += PedQtdCan // Qtde Cancelada &TotGerPedVlrCan += PedQtdCan* PedVlrUntComDsc &TotGerPedVlrItmComDsc += PedVlrItmComDsc
EndFor
&ProPadForRaz = trim(str(&ProPadForCod)) +'-'+trim(&auxProPadForRaz) If &TotForPedVlrItm > 0 Print FornecedorSintetico &TotForPedVlrItm = 0 &TotForPedQtd = 0 &TotForPedVlrItmComDsc = 0 &TotForPedQtdCan = 0 &TotForPedVlrCan = 0 EndIf
Print TotalGeralsintetico EndIf
Footer print Rodape End

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: Respeite o meio ambiente. Evite a impressão desnecessária deste documento!
